name: 12q14_HMGA2_SD
description: 12q14.3 segmental duplication interval flanking HMGA2 and MDM2. Recurrent SD-mediated rearrangements drive the 12q14 microdeletion syndrome (silver-Russell-like / osteopoikilosis-spectrum) and the HMGA2 translocations / amplifications in lipomas and uterine leiomyomas.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of 50-200 kb at ~95% identity around HMGA2 and MDM2; recurrent 12q14 microdeletion (~3.4 Mb) flanked by paired SDs; somatic MDM2 amplicon expanded in liposarcoma.
